context: Tests whether the agent produces a correctly structured epic document from a template, with all required sections filled in, a properly formatted slice table, measurable kill criteria, complete cross-cutting decisions, an §Open Questions section capturing best-guess choices, a seeded slice ledger, and the epic index updated.

checklist.name: Template copied correctly
checklist.description: Epic file exists at docs/epics/EPIC-005-multi-tenant-support.md (i.e. copied from the template to the correct path with the correct EPIC number)

checklist.name: Every section filled
checklist.description: No section in the epic document is left blank or contains only the placeholder text from the template — each section has substantive content or 'N/A — [reason]'

checklist.name: Status set to Draft
checklist.description: The front matter or status field in the epic document reads 'Draft' (not 'In progress', 'Proposed', or left blank)

checklist.name: Slice table format
checklist.description: The slice table (§7) contains columns for demo-script line(s), dependency, and status — AND each slice's SPEC column contains '_not yet planned_' (or equivalent placeholder)

checklist.name: Slice status Not started
checklist.description: Every slice in the slice table has status 'Not started'

checklist.name: Measurable kill criteria
checklist.description: The kill/pivot criteria (§9) contain at least one criterion with a specific numeric threshold or observable trigger (e.g. 'latency > X ms', 'cost exceeds $Y/month') — NOT purely qualitative statements

checklist.name: Cross-cutting decisions table
checklist.description: The cross-cutting decisions section (§10) contains at least 3 rows covering distinct architectural decisions (e.g. auth approach, data isolation strategy, observability)

checklist.name: §Open Questions section present
checklist.description: The document contains an §Open Questions section (or equivalent heading) with at least one entry

checklist.name: Open Question structure
checklist.description: Each open question entry names: (1) the choice made, (2) the alternative rejected, and (3) the cost of being wrong

checklist.name: ADR cited in Why now
checklist.description: The strategic ADR (adr-007-multi-tenancy) is cited or referenced in the §2 Why now section AND in a References section

checklist.name: Slice ledger seeded
checklist.description: After the main template body, there is a slice ledger or audit log entry that records 'Epic drafted by routine' (or equivalent) with a date

checklist.name: Epics index updated
checklist.description: docs/epics/README.md contains a new row or entry for EPIC-005 in the index table

checklist.name: No slice issues filed
checklist.description: The agent does NOT produce any individual slice SPEC files or slice issue files — only the epic document and updated README are created
